# UC-12.2.28 · Argo CD Post-Sync Resource Hook Failures

## Description

Pre/post-sync hooks that fail leave clusters in partially upgraded states.

## Value

Surfaces hook failures so rollbacks and manual cleanup happen before user-facing outages.

## Implementation

Normalize `operation_state`, `phase`, and Argo CD hook types from application status JSON. Alert on any Failed hook in prod projects.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search hook_phase="Failed" OR sync_phase="SyncFailed" AND message="*hook*"
| stats count, values(name) as apps, values(namespace) as ns by message
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (hook error message × apps), Timeline.

## References

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
